codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly updates both rotation terminal actions to navigate to /dashboard/{profileId} with / fallback, but it does not resolve the previously flagged rotate-keyset test/assertion mismatch. Two of three blocking items are fixed; one blocking item remains.

issues.description: The test still asserts `screen.getByText("02a3f8...8f2c")`, while the rendered value in RotateKeysetFormScreen remains `"*************"` (`src/screens/RotateKeysetScreens.tsx:26`). This leaves the original rotate-keyset-form assertion/component mismatch unresolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill's strict tests-first TDD step does not match common fix-only workflow used here (implementation + existing-test updates), and worker feedback explicitly calls this out. The skill could document a fix-path variant to reduce procedure drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 08890e30-76cd-4460-ab25-ac5679022ede shows implementation edits before test edits; handoff.skillFeedback suggests adjusting ui-builder guidance for fix-only features.

summary: Reviewed fix feature 628d0e0 against prior failures in rotate-keyset-form, rotate-keyset-completion, and rotate-share-flow. Dashboard navigation fixes are correctly implemented for RotateDistributionComplete and LocalShareUpdated, but the rotate-keyset test/assertion mismatch remains in the committed code, so this fix review fails.
